시편 94:1.content: Yahweh, you God to whom vengeance belongs, you God to whom vengeance belongs, shine out.

시편 94:2.content: Rise up, you judge of the earth. Pay back the proud what they deserve.

시편 94:3.content: Yahweh, how long will the wicked, how long will the wicked triumph?

시편 94:4.content: They pour out arrogant words. All the evildoers boast.

시편 94:5.content: They break your people in pieces, Yahweh, and afflict your heritage.

시편 94:6.content: They kill the widow and the alien, and murder the fatherless.

시편 94:7.content: They say, “Yah will not see, neither will Jacob’s God consider.”

시편 94:8.content: Consider, you senseless among the people; you fools, when will you be wise?

시편 94:9.content: He who implanted the ear, won’t he hear? He who formed the eye, won’t he see?

시편 94:10.content: He who disciplines the nations, won’t he punish? He who teaches man knows.

시편 94:11.content: Yahweh knows the thoughts of man, that they are futile.

시편 94:12.content: Blessed is the man whom you discipline, Yah, and teach out of your law,

시편 94:13.content: that you may give him rest from the days of adversity, until the pit is dug for the wicked.

시편 94:14.content: For Yahweh won’t reject his people, neither will he forsake his inheritance.

시편 94:15.content: For judgment will return to righteousness. All the upright in heart shall follow it.

시편 94:16.content: Who will rise up for me against the wicked? Who will stand up for me against the evildoers?

시편 94:17.content: Unless Yahweh had been my help, my soul would have soon lived in silence.

시편 94:18.content: When I said, “My foot is slipping!” Your loving kindness, Yahweh, held me up.

시편 94:19.content: In the multitude of my thoughts within me, your comforts delight my soul.

시편 94:20.content: Shall the throne of wickedness have fellowship with you, which brings about mischief by statute?

시편 94:21.content: They gather themselves together against the soul of the righteous, and condemn the innocent blood.

시편 94:22.content: But Yahweh has been my high tower, my God, the rock of my refuge.

시편 94:23.content: He has brought on them their own iniquity, and will cut them off in their own wickedness. Yahweh, our God, will cut them off.
